fields.label: Wizard Status
fields.options:
Pending
Hidden
Config Done
Skip
General specs
Parse failed
Parsed
Finalized

fields.description: Per-sheet parse-failure taxonomy (reactive #166). Only the three IN-SCOPE failure cases are recorded: Config stale (saved sheet_config no longer validates), Parser error (parse_boq raised), Insert error (per-sheet row insert raised). Blank = no recorded failure. Skip/Hidden/Ineligible/general-specs are NOT failures and never set this. Cleared on a subsequent successful parse.
fields.label: Parse Failure Category
fields.options:
Config stale
Parser error
Insert error

fields.description: Human-readable specific reason for the recorded parse failure (the why that used to die in a logger.warning / coarse list). For Config stale this captures the validation detail; for Parser/Insert errors a concise message plus an Error Log handle when available. Cleared on a subsequent successful parse.
fields.label: Parse Failure Reason

fields.description: When the recorded parse failure was captured. Cleared on a subsequent successful parse.
fields.label: Parse Failure At
